## Summary

Reduces the excessive vertical whitespace between sections on the landing page (`app/page.tsx`). The large gaps made the page feel disconnected on laptop and tablet views. All spacing is now responsive — tighter on mobile, slightly more generous on large screens.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `app/page.tsx` — Section padding and grid gaps across all 9 sections

**Changes:**
- Hero: Removed `min-h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]` (was forcing full-viewport height even when content didn't need it). Now uses `py-12 lg:py-16` instead of `py-20 lg:py-28`.
- All sections: `py-20` → `py-12 lg:py-16` (48px mobile, 64px desktop — was 80px everywhere)
- Inner grid gaps: `gap-12` → `gap-8 lg:gap-10` where applicable
- Card grid top margins: `mt-12` → `mt-8`
- "Not a chatbot" contrast section: `py-16` → `py-10 lg:py-12`

**Does NOT touch:**
- No content changes
- No color/font/typography changes
- No component structure changes
- No pipeline or backend changes

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Purely cosmetic CSS change — no functional risk
- All values use Tailwind responsive prefixes so mobile/tablet/desktop are independently controlled

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to landing page spacing
